title: Senior Smiles and Wellness Health Fair
description: Adults age 55 and older are invited for free dental, hearing, and diabetes screenings, blood pressure tests and other free health services and resources.
venue: University of the Pacific, Arthur A. Dugoni School of Dentistry

title: inkBoat present the World Premiere of "Clouds from a Crumbling Giant: our wild shining days"
description: inkBoat present the World Premiere of "Clouds from a Crumbling Giant: our wild shining days" at Z Space as part of the San Francisco International Art Festival.

title: After Dark: Ride On
description: Join a bike-powered dance party, get hands-on with basic bike maintenance, and check out unusual two-wheelers.

description: Mufutau Yusuf presents the West Coast Premier of "Impasse" at Dance Mission Theatre as part of the San Francisco International Arts Festival.

title: California Native Homeland Festival
description: Celebrate the art, culture, and beauty of California's Indigenous foodways.

description: Duane Forrest presents "Bob Marley: How Reggae Changed the World" at Monkeybrains Theatre as part of San Francisco International Art Festival.

title: Dreamland: a Circus Sleepover
description: Get ready to crash a wild circus sleepover where Circus Gilly performs acrobatic flips, aerial arts, dancing and general clowning around.

title: After Party
description: Step into an interactive playground of hands-on exhibits, music, and pop-up experiences. Our exclusive new After Party keeps the atmosphere electric till midnight!

title: After Dark: Climate Journeys
description: Climate change is a complex problem that requires imaginative solutions.

title: Astrophysicist Alex Filippenko at the Orinda Theatre
description: Explore the universe with world-renowned astrophysicist and UC Berkeley professor Alex Filippenko in his talk, "Exciting Results with NASA's James Webb Space Telescope."

description: Eth-Noh-Tec presents "STRONG LIKE BAMBOO 3: Stories of Resilience from Across America" at the San Francisco international Arts Festival

title: Cirque Kikasse Presents "SANTÉ!"
description: Cirque Kikasse from Quebec make their California debut with their brilliant and world-renowned truck show, SANTÉ! as part of the San Francisco International Arts Festival.

title: 21+ Mad Tea Party: an Alice in Wonderland Immersive Experience
description: Oakland's iconic theme park opens its Fairy Gates rarely for adults-only parties after dark! Come tumble down the rabbit hole into a world of cocktails, costumes, cabaret and dancing under the stars!

title: Melissa Cruz Flamenco presents "Flamenco Cabaret"
description: Melissa Cruz Flamenco presents "Flamenco Cabaret" at Mission Masonic Center as part of the San Francisco International Art Festival

title: An evening of infinite drams
description: Fog City Social celebrates rare and exceptional spirits in style & offers an elevated VIP experience for all, meet the distillers behind the bottles and indulge in cocktails, cigars & luxury lounges.

description: Algiin Ford presents "Silent Assassin (My Addictive Mind)" at the San Francisco international Arts Festival

title: San Francisco Congressional Candidate Forum
description: The race for San Francisco's representative in U.S. Congress is on — and this forum gives you the chance to hear directly from the people asking for your vote.
organizer: League of Women Voters of San Francisco

title: Free movie screening + panel discussion: “No Place to Grow Old”
description: Free screening of "No Place to Grow Old," a documentary on senior housing insecurity, followed by a panel discussion with local advocates working on solutions in our San Francisco community.
organizer: League of Women Voters of San Francisco
